use_codes.desc: TREATMENT OF PAIN IN PATIENTS WITH HEPATIC IMPAIRMENT

indications.text:
ZOHYDRO® ER (hydrocodone bitartrate) is indicated for the management of pain severe enough to require
daily, around-the-clock, long-term opioid treatment and for which alternative treatment options are inadequate.
Limitations of Use
• Because of the risks of addiction, abuse, and misuse with opioids...
